summary: The team is sprinting toward a September launch of the China Going Global report with IE, while simultaneously redesigning the knowledge website, prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China for SEO, and selecting a social media agency—all under tight deadlines this week.
summaryDetail: The top priority is the China Going Global report with IE: the team must submit scoring sheets for the overseas social media advertising bid evaluation by July 23 noon, and Ira and Julie need to review their sections using the updated translation by July 23. Meanwhile, the knowledge website redesign is converging on a combined layout that emphasizes articles and indices, with Joseph to share the HTML file and the team to mark feedback on Joker's design. For SEO, the team is focusing on Asia Star and Intelligent China programs, with the Intelligent China webpage launching this week and an audit of participant profiles underway. Urgent this week: Julie must publish the 'Disruptive Timing' news article by July 22, and Joseph needs to create the Indonesia Emerging Markets program webpage by July 21. The social media agency selection is being expedited with Media Minds as the preferred choice.

meetings.title: Outlook账号锁定问题排查
meetings.summary: 讨论并解决了因多设备使用旧密码导致Outlook账号被锁定的问题，建议删除账号重新登录并更新密码。

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting
meetings.summary: Discussion about worshiping three three-story halls and later arriving at the team's location.

meetings.title: Knowledge Website Redesign Review
meetings.summary: Team reviewed two knowledge website redesign proposals, finding Joker's version too similar to current site and preferring Joseph's more editorial layout with more articles. Decided to combine elements from both, focusing on showing more articles, removing video section, and bringing indices to homepage.

meetings.title: SEO & Program Prioritization Strategy
meetings.summary: Team discusses SEO strategy to rank for AI, EVs, and smart manufacturing programs in China, prioritizing Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships.

meetings.title: Marketing Team Meeting - June 29, 2026
meetings.summary: Team discussed feedback on menu categorization, school brochure updates, CES quotes, Ding Hight Hall video, Asia Start articles, Davos press release, social media agency scouting, and IE report translation. Decisions made on Shun Tian Shu press release approach and prioritizing Media Minds for social media.

meetings.title: Joint Report on Chinese Companies Going Global
meetings.summary: Meeting to plan a joint report between CKGSB and IE on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, with a working title 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'. The report will feature research from Professor Leeway, op-eds from leadership, and case studies, aiming for a September launch at events in Singapore.

actionItems.detail: Professor Zhu confirmed the article; Julie will publish and promote it.

decisions.text: 删除所有设备上的Outlook账号，重新登录以更新密码。
Remove dedicated video section; videos will be dispersed by topic.
Combine elements from Joker's and Joseph's designs, focusing on showing more articles and bringing indices to homepage.
Keep the school menu at top left and knowledge menu centered.
Prioritize Asia Star and Intelligent China programs over US partnerships for initial SEO efforts.
Intelligent China webpage to launch this week; Asia Star page already live.
Only one press release for Shun Tian Shu, incorporating 10 points or turning into 10-point article.
Prioritize Media Minds as social media agency due to budget constraints and time sensitivity.
Translate no more than 50% of IE report (80+ pages Chinese) for English feature.
The report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE, with joint distribution.
